prompt:
Create an ultra-detailed gothic Victorian miniature dollhouse room diorama inside a dark hexagonal shadow-box display, viewed from the front at a slightly elevated angle like a high-end handcrafted resin model. The scene is a luxurious black-and-gold fantasy bedroom for Veil, with a moody occult antique atmosphere, warm candlelight, and photorealistic macro depth of field.

Canvas and composition: square image, centered symmetrical room box with a peaked arched roof frame, visible black exterior edges, dark background outside the miniature. The room has dark wood herringbone flooring and ornate black lacquer furniture with aged gold trim. Lighting is low key, with amber highlights and deep shadows.

Main subjects: on the central canopy bed, place exactly 2 seated doll-like figures: 1 small black-haired child doll in a dark dress and 1 older caretaker doll in a white shirt with dark vest, sitting close together. Their faces should be softly obscured or out of focus, not clearly readable, while their bodies and clothing remain detailed.

Central furniture and architecture: include exactly 1 large black canopy bed with carved posts, black bedding, gold embroidery, heavy sheer lace curtains, tassels, and ornate drapery. The two front bedposts should be wrapped by exactly 2 dark serpentine dragon/snake sculptures, one on each side, rising upward. Above the bed hang exactly 1 large central lantern chandelier with a warm flame glow and exactly 1 smaller hanging lamp deeper in the room.

Left side objects: include exactly 1 tall bookcase-cabinet with antique books and a lower cabinet door decorated with a gold snake emblem; exactly 1 narrow stained-glass gothic window; exactly 1 ornate gold wall mirror; exactly 1 small fireplace or glowing hearth below the mirror; exactly 1 tall white candle on a side table.

Foreground objects: include exactly 1 low black chest or tea table in the front left with gold trim and many tiny drawers. On top of it place exactly 1 glass teapot, exactly 2 teacups with saucers, and exactly 1 small dish or tray. In the center foreground place exactly 1 round dark green-and-black rug with intricate gold filigree and fringe.

Right side objects: include exactly 1 black vanity/sink cabinet with a brass basin and curved faucet, exactly 3 visible drawers, gold floral inlay, and small toiletry bottles. Above or beside it include exactly 1 wall sconce/candlelight, exactly 1 small round mirror or framed object, and exactly 1 vase with dark blue flowers.

Visual style: photorealistic miniature craftsmanship, ornate gothic fantasy, black lacquer, antique brass, dark emerald accents, lace, velvet, filigree, carved wood, tiny books, smoky warm candle glow, high contrast, shallow depth of field, extremely detailed textures, cinematic macro photography, no text, no watermark, no modern objects.
